hero.subtitle: by CardBook
hero.ctaNote: By invitation only · Strictly limited seats

about.body1: The Networking Club is not a conference. It is a carefully curated gathering of the city's most influential founders, C-level executives, and decision-makers — brought together in one room, one evening, with no agenda.
about.body2: We believe the most transformative conversations happen outside the boardroom. CardBook exists to make those moments happen with intention, curation, and discretion.
about.pullQuote: No panels. No pitches. Just the right people in the right room.

items.title: Vetted Community
items.desc: Access is granted upon a standard profile verification to ensure a highly relevant professional environment for all attendees.

items.title: CardBook Members Access
items.desc: Complimentary entrance and free registration for all verified members of the CardBook Ecosystem.

items.title: Drinks & Bar
items.desc: A premium selection of spirits, wines, and signature cocktails will be available for purchase throughout the evening.

items.title: Complimentary Snacks
items.desc: Enjoy a curated selection of complimentary finger foods and light snacks during the networking sessions.

venue.addressSub: Middle Tower · Adjacent to Sharona Market

items.title: Doors Open & Reception
items.desc: Guest arrival, registration, and activation of digital Connect profiles.

items.title: Official Opening & Vision
items.desc: Keynote by CardBook founders and the Panthera team introducing the platform's networking ecosystem.

items.title: AI-Powered Matchmaking
items.desc: Curated introductions, targeted interactions in Executive Connection Rooms, and live opportunity tracking.

items.title: Open Networking & Spotlights
items.desc: Fluid interactions enhanced by active digital displays and high-energy attendee spotlight sessions.

items.title: Close of Evening
items.desc: Final connections, closing remarks, and farewell.

footer.tagline: Exclusive gatherings for those who shape the future.
